RouteMaster.summary: A high-performance, resilient, and feature-rich railway routing and safety platform combining RAPTOR/Turbo algorithms with machine learning and a Women & Family Safety Engine.
lessons_learned: RAPTOR multi-hop discovery can stall due to severe congestion caps. Search budgets must balance depth with transfer limits.
Telegram webhook mode requires careful parity between bot config and production environment variables to verify initData signatures.
Redis cache synchronization for ML inference workers can cause p99 latency spikes (15ms+) if not audited properly.
successful_patterns: Vibe-to-Code pipeline with Kimi Swarm architecture for generating complex features autonomously.
Tiered route hydration (15/10/10/10 distribution) using unified orchestrator and Pareto Optimizer.

global_decisions.decision: Migrated from project-coupled CLI tools to an independent, portable Antigravity-orchestrated 'Office' structure.
global_decisions.reason: To ensure agents retain knowledge across projects and allow for easy deployment on new machines from zero.
